title: Drones, robots & precision fire: How Ukraine is defying Russian juggernaut
content: Ukraine is showcasing remarkable resilience against Russia through its innovative defense industry. The nation is producing millions of drones, long-range missiles, and robotic systems. These advanced weapons allow Ukraine to strike deep behind enemy lines and preserve its soldiers. This technological prowess is enabling Ukraine to effectively counter a larger adversary, demonstrating a new model of national resistance.

title: IPL 2026: ‘It’s not a Hardik Pandya problem’- MI skipper hits back on Jasprit Bumrah debate
content: Mumbai Indians achieved a significant victory against Gujarat Titans. Skipper Hardik Pandya highlighted Jasprit Bumrah's impactful new ball spell and Tilak Varma's exceptional batting as crucial. Young players also delivered strong performances. This win is seen as a potential turning point for the team's season, especially after facing challenges in Ahmedabad.

title: Yann LeCun says Anthropic CEO 'knows absolutely nothing' about AI effects on jobs
content: AI expert Yann LeCun disagrees with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei's forecast of AI eliminating many entry-level jobs. LeCun suggests economists are better equipped to analyze technological impacts on employment. Amodei previously warned AI could replace a significant portion of white-collar roles within five years, calling AI a general labor substitute.

title: 'Can't let politician ...': Delhi HC Judge rejects Kejriwal's recusal plea in excise case
content: Kejriwal had appeared in person before the court seeking recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from hearing a CBI petition challenging his discharge in the liquor policy case. In the application, Kejriwal claimed that there was a grave, bona fide, and reasonable apprehension that the hearing in the matter before her would not be impartial and neutral.

title: As Amazon, SpaceX clash at FCC, Musk congratulates Bezos on New Glenn rocket launch
content: Blue Origin successfully launched its New Glenn rocket, showcasing reusable booster technology with a vertical landing.  This achievement, acknowledged by Elon Musk, comes amidst ongoing regulatory disputes between Amazon and SpaceX concerning satellite proposals.  Both companies are vying for FCC approval for large satellite constellations, highlighting a competitive landscape in space infrastructure.

title: 'Don't think we hit right areas': Gill blames bowlers after GT bowled out for 100
content: "Honestly, I think we gave away too many runs in the middle overs. On a wicket like that, I think 160-170 was a par score. But I think there are a lot of learnings for us from this game," Gill said.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' box office day 4: Akshay Kumar starrer records mild weekday growth
content: 'Bhooth Bangla,' featuring Akshay Kumar, has burst onto the cinematic scene, creeping close to Rs 100 crore in worldwide earnings over its opening weekend. This horror-comedy, helmed by Priyadarshan, saw an impressive Rs 58.75 crore net in India by the fourth day. Viewers are embracing the film with enthusiasm, making the weekday box office performance a hot topic of discussion. Read on to know more in detail.

title: SRK’s ‘King’ India rights sold for Rs 250 crore to Pen Marudhar
content: Shah Rukh Khan's highly anticipated film 'King', with a massive Rs 400 crore budget, has secured its all-India theatrical distribution rights for a staggering Rs 250 crore.  Directed by Siddharth Anand, the action spectacle featuring a star-studded cast is set for a Christmas 2026 release, aiming for a wide theatrical run amidst tough Hollywood competition.

title: 'Everyone can have a penthouse if they want': Elon Musk on AI-driven future
content: Elon Musk reignited debate on universal basic income, proposing it as a solution to AI-driven job losses. He envisions a future of extreme abundance where AI and robotics will generate vast goods and services, making even luxuries like penthouses widely accessible without inflation. Musk previously predicted no poverty, only universal high income.

title: Tilak Varma turns it around: MI storm Ahmedabad, GT wiped out in 99-run rout
content: In the second innings, Jasprit Bumrah, Hardik Pandya and Ashwani Kumar removed GT’s heavyweight top three inside the powerplay, after which the batting line-up did not recover.

title: Lord Michael farmer: Candace Owens’ father-in-law targeted in Feud
content: Candace Owens and Laura Loomer’s online feud has now involved Lord Michael Farmer, Owens’ father-in-law. Loomer directly questioned him on X, making the situation more personal. Farmer, a British businessman and UK peer, had earlier shared his views on antisemitism and Israel in 2024. Neither Farmer nor Owens has responded to Loomer’s recent comments yet.

title: Lauren Kyle celebrates milestone as McDavid eyes Stanley Cup glory
content: Connor McDavid capped the regular season with four assists, clinching his sixth Art Ross Trophy as the Oilers secured home-ice advantage. His growing chemistry with linemates and a strong team performance signal readiness for the playoffs. Off the ice, Lauren Kyle’s proud reaction added a personal layer. With momentum and structure in place, Edmonton enters its first-round series against Anaheim with real expectations.

title: Brazilian triathlete Mara Araujo’s final post resurfaces after tragedy
content: Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo died during the swimming leg of the Ironman Texas triathlon on April 19, 2026. Her last Instagram post, shared hours earlier, has gone viral after her death. Reports from Chosun.com and Yahoo confirm she went missing during the swim. A close friend revealed she was unwell before the race but still chose to compete.

title: Gabrielle Carrington: X-factor finalist arrested after Soho crash injures woman
content: A car crash outside a Soho nightclub in London left three people injured, including influencer Klaudia Zakrzewska. Gabrielle Carrington, a former X Factor finalist, has been arrested on serious charges. Police say the incident followed an argument and is not terror-related. Authorities are asking witnesses to come forward as the investigation continues into the early morning collision.

title: Quote of the day by Mark Twain: 'Courage is resistance to fear, mastery of fear'
content: Renowned humorist Mark Twain's famous quote, 'Courage is resistance to fear, mastery of fear - not absence of fear,' offers a profound insight into human behavior.  It highlights that true bravery lies not in lacking fear, but in the conscious decision to confront and overcome it, a skill developed through experience and willpower, applicable in everyday life.

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions for April 21, 2026
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 21, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: ‘Once I settled, I knew…’- Tilak Varma reveals turning point behind maiden ton
content: Tilak Varma's spectacular maiden IPL century, an unbeaten 101 off 45 balls, showcased immense patience and clutch execution.  After a cautious start, he unleashed a blistering assault, guiding Mumbai Indians to a commanding total.  His innings, crucial for the team's campaign, highlighted a blend of strategic batting and fearless strokeplay under pressure, ultimately leading to a significant victory.

title: The Bengal test: Can Mamata hold, or will BJP crack the bastion?
content: West Bengal gears up for a fierce electoral battle as Mamata Banerjee's TMC faces a strong challenge from the BJP, aiming to breach her long-held bastion. The Congress-Left alliance seeks to regain lost ground amidst concerns over violence and governance.

title: Raids, arrests & green file: Why I-PAC is in political crosshairs in Mamata's West Bengal
content: An Enforcement Directorate investigation into political consultancy firm I-PAC has ignited a major political clash in West Bengal. The probe, initially focused on money laundering, has escalated into a confrontation involving raids and arrests. Chief minister Mamata Banerjee's alleged intervention during a raid has become a central point of contention, with both parties trading accusations ahead of crucial elections.

title: IPL 2026: Tilak Varma scripts history, becomes joint-fastest ever to hit…
content: Tilak Varma delivered a stunning counterattack for Mumbai Indians, smashing an unbeaten 101 off 45 balls against Gujarat Titans. After a slow start, he unleashed a brutal assault, scoring 82 runs in his last 23 deliveries. This remarkable century, achieved at No. 5, silenced recent form concerns and marked a powerful resurgence.

title: How Middle East war could impact India’s trade and macro stability
content: NITI Aayog's report highlights the Middle East conflict's potential impact on India's trade and economy, risking the current account deficit and exchange rate. Instability also slows India-GCC FTA talks, hindering market access. Despite global uncertainty, merchandise trade remains steady, with services showing strong performance.

title: 'Gini Weds Sunny 2': Sudhir Pandey on ‘walk-off’ row, denies being disrespected
content: A short video from the recent trailer launch of Ginny Weds Sunny 2 has set social media abuzz, with many viewers assuming that veteran actor Sudhir Pandey walked off stage following an uncomfortable moment. The clip quickly led to speculation about a possible disagreement or lack of respect from the film’s team. However, Pandey has now addressed the chatter, making it clear that the situation was far from what it appeared online.

title: Big payback: US launches portal to refund $166 billion in collected tariffs
content: The US government has launched a tool to refund over $166 billion in tariffs imposed by former President Trump, following a Supreme Court ruling. Importers can now submit documentation to recover payments, with electronic refunds for approximately $127 billion in duties available initially.  The extent of consumer repayment hinges on companies sharing recovered funds.

title: PSL cracks down! Dasun Shanaka handed one-year ban after IPL switch
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board has banned Sri Lanka captain Dasun Shanaka for one year from the Pakistan Super League after he withdrew to join an IPL franchise. The PCB cited a breach of contractual obligations for the decision. Blessing Muzarabani also received a two-year ban for a similar issue, though his agent disputes the contract's validity.

title: 'A win-win for both nations!' Three-day India-US trade talks to begin this week
content: India and the US are resuming trade negotiations in Washington DC from April 20-22 to discuss the first phase of their bilateral trade agreement. The talks are being held under a revised framework following recent shifts in the US tariff regime, which have reduced India's previous trade advantages and necessitate recalibration of the agreement.

title: 'Bulldozer buddhi': Mahua calls Yogi Adityanath 'a joke' over Swami Vivekanand quote gaffe
content: TMC MP Mahua Moitra and her party have strongly criticized UP CM Yogi Adityanath for wrongly attributing Subhas Chandra Bose's famous quote to Swami Vivekananda. The TMC highlighted this gaffe as evidence of the BJP's "shocking ignorance and contempt for Bengal’s history," questioning their ambition to build 'Sonar Bangla' given their perceived lack of knowledge about the state's icons.

title: Crude affair: Why the world is still hooked on oil despite better options
content: A global promise to shift from fossil fuels faces significant hurdles. Economic ties to oil and powerful industry lobbying impede progress. Political will is also a key factor. Despite these challenges, renewable energy sources are expanding rapidly worldwide, offering a glimpse of future change.

title: 'New, huge quake': Japan's special advisory after 7.5 tremor; 80 cm tsunami recorded
content: Japan issued a special advisory warning of a heightened risk of a "huge" earthquake following a powerful 7.5 magnitude tremor off its northern coast. The quake triggered tsunami alerts and evacuations, though no major damage or injuries were reported. Officials stressed preparedness while urging residents to continue daily life.

title: 'Ghabraiye, aap Mullanpur mein hain': Arshdeep's jab at LSG goes viral - Watch
content: "Ghabraiye, aap Mullanpur mein hain," said Arshdeep Singh in a reel posted on his Instagram account after the match in Mullanpur, New Chandigarh.

title: JEE Mains 2026 Session 2 result out: Download scorecards here
content: The National Testing Agency has announced the JEE Main 2026 Session 2 results. Twenty-six students achieved a perfect 100 percentile. Candidates can check their scorecards on the official NTA website. The cut-off for JEE Advanced eligibility has also been released. Top performers will now prepare for JEE Advanced, the next step for IIT admissions.

title: Rakesh Bedi recalls visiting Javed Akhtar for food, drinks in FTII days
content: Rakesh Bedi is experiencing a career resurgence with 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'. A recent YouTube video by Farah Khan revealed their long-standing friendship, dating back to their teenage years when Bedi and his FTII friends would visit Khan's family for meals. Bedi's performance as Jameel Jamali in the hit film has garnered significant praise and box office success.

title: ‘Days of Our Lives’ actor Patrick Muldoon dies at 57 from heart attack
content: Veteran actor Patrick Muldoon, celebrated for his role as Austin Reed on 'Days of Our Lives,' has tragically passed away at 57 following a reported heart attack. Muldoon, who also starred in 'Melrose Place' and 'Starship Troopers,' was a beloved figure in television and film. His recent appearance at the Saturn Awards highlighted his enduring presence in the industry.

title: LeBron does it again, and one team has a big problem: Windhorst on the first weekend of the playoffs
content: A 25-year-old LeBron strategy for the Lakers, a new defense in Cleveland and a message from Oklahoma City: Here's what we learned as the postseason tipped off.

title: Even in retirement, Chris Paul's legacy is rooted in this season's playoffs
content: Dozens of NBA players have been mentored by the future Hall of Famer, and many of them are vying for the title.

title: Garoppolo considering retirement, sources say
content: Free agent quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo is considering retirement, sources told NFL Network on Monday.

title: Sources: OBJ works out for Giants, takes physical
content: The Giants had free agent wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr. in for a workout and physical with the team Monday, sources told ESPN.

title: Draymond on Kerr's future: 'Felt like that was it'
content: Draymond Green said while he hopes Steve Kerr is back, he'd guess that this past season was Kerr's last as coach with the franchise.

title: Jefferson blunt on McCarthy with Kyler a Viking
content: Speaking publicly Monday for the first time about the Vikings' new quarterback room, Justin Jefferson said he is looking forward to Kyler Murray's playmaking skills and was blunt about J.J. McCarthy's future.

title: Cowboys make Aubrey NFL's highest-paid kicker
content: Brandon Aubrey and the Cowboys reached an agreement Monday on a deal that will make him the highest-paid kicker in NFL history, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: 49ers, Williams settle deal drama with $50M pact
content: The San Francisco 49ers and left tackle Trent Williams agreed to a two-year, $50 million extension, his agency announced Monday.

title: Amid threats, Yanks' Schlittler excited to face Sox
content: Yankees pitcher Cam Schlittler said he and his family have received threats ahead of his start vs. the Red Sox, but he's "excited" to be making his Fenway Park debut.

title: Korir wins Boston Marathon again in record time
content: Defending champion John Korir broke the Boston Marathon course record Monday, riding a tailwind to outrun the fastest field in event history and win in an unofficial 2 hours, 1 minute, 52 seconds for his second straight victory.

title: ✨ Top 50 players in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs
content: As 16 teams face off for the ultimate prize in pro sports, these players will have the biggest impact.

content: How early could Jeremiyah Love be drafted? Will Ty Simpson go in Round 1? Adam Schefter has the latest.

title: The Warriors begin an offseason with massive uncertainty
content: Golden State enters another offseason in search of a co-star for Stephen Curry, and the Warriors might be searching for a new coach too.

content: From major league stars to prospects to if-all-goes-wrong candidates, here's who could be on the trade block come August.

content: The Oilers and Ducks finally join the party. Here's what to watch, along with Sunday's highlights and stats.

content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

content: North Carolina awaits a decision from Henri Veesaar while Kansas and Kentucky vie for the No. 1 recruit.

content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

title: The beer shower can wait, but this Bayern side deserves to be celebrated
content: Bayern Munich successfully defended their Bundesliga crown thanks to a merciless attack and impressive solidarity.

content: Man City's win over Arsenal has thrown the title race back in City's favor, plus Man United beat Chelsea.

content: One of the biggest music festivals each year came and went with big name athletes taking in the desert.

title: 'Nobody was going to beat the 10th pick:' How the Bengals wooed the Giants into trading vet Dexter Lawrence
content: Lawrence informed the Giants he wanted a new deal or trade, the Giants didn't want to let him go -- until the price was right.

content: Nashville SC continue their great week as they move on up in this week's edition of ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

content: Barcelona are stepping up their pursuit of Atalanta right back Marco Palestra, while Arsenal remain interested in Julián Álvarez.

content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: Mumbai Businessman Loses Rs 3.25 Crore In Cheating-Cum-Extortion Case
content: A nine-member inter-state criminal gang allegedly duped a Mumbai-based businessman of around Rs 3.25 crore in a cheating-cum-extortion case and also assaulted and threatened him, a police official said on Monday.

title: 33-Year-Old Man Dies By Suicide After Killing His Wife In Gurugram: Cops
content: A 33-year-old taxi driver allegedly strangled his wife to death before killing himself at their rented house in Ambedkar Nagar, Sector 9, police said on Monday.

title: Ahead Of Pak Talks, Trump Says Iran Deal Will Be "Far Better" Than Obama Nuke Deal
content: Donald Trump on Monday escalated his criticism of "The Iran Nuclear Deal", asserting that any new deal under his administration would be "far better" than the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA).

title: "You Are Entering Military Blockade": US' Hormuz Action With Machinegun
content: In the CENTCOM video, a US soldier is seen pointing a heavy-calibre machinegun at a vessel as the Americans give warnings on radio

title: Liquor Ban Extended To 96 Hours In Bengal Ahead Of Phase 1 Polls
content: In a statement, the Election Commission said, "It has been observed that there is an unusual spurt in sale of liquor". in West Bengal

title: UP Teen Kills Younger Brother With Scissors During Argument Over New Shoes
content: The altercation soon escalated, and in a fit of rage, Suraj allegedly picked up a pair of scissors and attacked Laxman, inflicting multiple injuries on his head and hands.

title: Trump's "I'm Winning War By A Lot" Claim As Uncertainty Looms Over Pak Talks
content: A US delegation is expected to travel to Pakistan in the coming days for a new round of direct negotiations with Iran, despite Tehran not confirming its participation. The talks would mark the second attempt at face-to-face discussions in Islamabad.

title: Cross-Border Car Smuggling In Focus As Bhutan Customs Team Arrives In Kerala
content: Bhutan Customs delegation arrived in Kerala as part of the ongoing probe under Operation Numkhor, the multi-agency investigation into suspected illegal import of vehicles from Bhutan that has earlier drawn national attention.

title: Op Mahadev: A Relentless Manhunt That Got Pahalgam Victims Justice
content: Swift intelligence fusion fiollowing teh Pahalgam attack led to the confirmation of the perpetrators as Sulaiman Shah, Hamza Afgani and Jibran Bhai of Lashkar-e-Taiba.

title: 'Iran Is Winning By Not Losing': Mehdi Hasan To NDTV On What US Faces
content: Any assumption that Iran would "roll over in week one or month one of this war reflects complete ignorance of history," Mehdi Hasan told NDTV

title: Unnao Rape Survivor's Plea Seeking Death Penalty For Kuldeep Sengar Dismissed
content: A bench of Justices Navin Chawla and Ravinder Dudeja ruled that the appeal against the trial court's 2020 decision to convict and sentence Kuldeep Sengar, his brother Jaideep Sengar and others in the case was filed after an "unexplained" delay of 1945 days.

title: Art Amid Rubble: Concert In Lebanon Aims To Defy War With Music
content: As participants pay homage to those killed in Israeli bombings, music and art have been used as powerful tools to keep the memory alive and defend Lebanon.

title: Big Quake Strikes Japan Again: What Makes The Nation So Vulnerable
content: Japan was hit by a 7.4-magnitude earthquake on Monday, Japan's Meteorological Agency (JMA) said, issuing a tsunami warning for waves up to three metres (10 feet).

title: 7.7-Magnitude Earthquake Hits Japan: How Much Damage Can It Cause?
content: A powerful 7.4-magnitude earthquake struck northern Japan, triggering tsunami warnings,Japan's Meteorological Agency (JMA) said on Monday.

title: "Pakistanis Have Done Good Job Of Sucking Up To Trump": Mehdi Hasan To NDTV
content: Pakistan has "done a good job" in cultivating closeness with Trump, Mehdi Hasan told NDTV's Vishnu Som in an exclusive interview.

title: 14 Indian Ships In Hormuz, New Delhi Intensifies Efforts For Safe Passage
content: The ships -- Indian-flagged cargo vessels - were fired on in the Strait of Hormuz on April 18. The incident occurred due to a communication gap between the Iranian government and the local unit of the Revolutionary Guard, sources said.

title: "Arvind Kejriwal's Illusions No Ground To Recuse": Delhi Judge In Liquor Policy Case
content: "I reject this application because my oath is to the Constitution," Delhi High Court judge Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma said on the petition by Arvind Kejriwal

title: Tiger, Leopard, Cheetah Seen Together In Rare Ranthambore Moment
content: In a rare and remarkable moment, three of the wild's most elusive predators, a tiger, a leopard and a cheetah, were sighted within the same landscape and time frame in Ranthambore's Zone 9, the Rajasthan Forest Department said.

title: In Bombed Facilities, Unstable Tunnels, US' Toughest Uranium Extraction Yet
content: Before US and Israeli strikes in June 2025, the International Atomic Energy Agency estimated that Iran possessed roughly 441 kilograms of uranium enriched to 60 per cent, alongside approximately 200 kilograms enriched to 20 per cent.

title: Sholinganallur candidates promise piped water supply, infrastructure development
content: Sitting MLA of the DMK Aravind Ramesh, AIADMK candidate K.P. Kandan, NTK’s Jayalakshmi Raman, and TVK’s P. Saravanamoorthy promise that all the needs of the constituency will be met

title: Bombay High Court quashes arrest of Sheetal Tejwani in two cases, upholds third
content: Tejwani was first arrested by the Khadak police in 2025 in connection with alleged irregularities in a land deal involving a firm linked to Parth, the son of late deputy chief minister Ajit Pawar

title: Election Commission will leave no stone unturned for free, fair and transparent election in West Bengal: CEC
content: The election will be ‘fear free, violence free, intimidation free, inducement free, chappa free, ⁠booth-jamming free, source-jamming free’, Gyanesh Kumar says

title: Both are actors who took the political route, but MGR-Vijay is a facile comparison
content: While MGR spent a long time in politics before he launched AIADMK, Vijay had no boots on the ground, until he formed the TVK, the political party

title: Thirupparankundram, where hillock, temple are in the thick of controversy
content: NTK’s T. Sathyadevi, Puthiya Tamilagam’s A. Sethuraman, and TVK’s R. Nirmalkumar are adding to the otherwise straight fight between V.V. Rajan Chellappa of the AIADMK and Kiruthiga Thangapandi of the DMK

title: West Bengal Assembly polls: Political clashes trigger concern with just hours to go for polling
content: Mamata Banerjee alleges ‘selective’ targeting of Trinamool workers as part of preventive arrests. The EC and the State police take down over 11,000 social media posts

title: A day before inauguration by PM Modi, fire breaks out at Rajasthan refinery
content: The HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) refinery, a ₹79,459 crore joint venture between HPCL and the Government of Rajasthan, was to be inaugurated by PM Modi on April 21, 2026.

title: 9.8 lakh deletions in Odisha’s voter rolls after electoral mapping process
content: Around two lakh Form-7 applications received after April 2, 2026 have been kept on hold; letter from the Office of the Chief Electoral Officer directs Electoral Registration Officers to carry out door-to-door survey, and physically verify the authenticity of voter rolls, which impacts final deletion

title: In Andhra Praadesh, Collectors race for investments
content: Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu will assign ranks to districts depending on how much capital is created

title: HC dismisses petitions seeking ED cases against former Ministers
content: Chief Justice’s Bench dismisses a batch of nine writ petitions filed by DMK Rajya Sabha member R. Girirajan for registering money laundering cases against them

title: 26 candidates bag perfect 100 NTA score in JEE-Main
content: Among the candidates who secured an NTA score of 100, five each are from Andhra Pradesh and Telangana followed by four from Rajasthan, three from Delhi, two each from Maharashtra and Haryana, and one candidate each from Chandigarh, Bihar, Tamil Nadu, Odisha and Gujarat; all the 26 are males

title: India is violating its obligations under international law: Francesca Albanese
content: The UN Special Rapporteur speaks on her latest report on the situation of human rights in the occupied Palestinian territories, flags legal and moral concerns for countries backing Israel

title: SC asks petitioner to move Madhya Pradesh HC to assist in contempt case against BJP MLA
content: The petitioner approached the apex court contending that the High Court had not passed directions ensuring investigation, evidence preservation and institutional safeguards

title: Strong winds batter Kothamangalam; houses damaged, trees uprooted
content: At least two houses were damaged, and farmers reported significant losses. Power supply was disrupted for hours after trees snapped lines and toppled electric poles. Winds wreaked havoc along the Kuttampuzha–Pooyamkutty stretch

title: Kalamassery Municipality to address residents’ concerns over revised structure plan
content: Civic body to set up help desk from May 1 to address concerns over revised zonal regulations in the plan. Ward-wise list of zones to be made available within a week

title: Delimitation, women’s reservation Bills were clubbed together to create confusion, says N. Ram
content: He asserts that women’s reservation and delimitation have no correlation whatsoever, and lauds Chief Minister M.K. Stalin for comprehending the designs of the Centre and projecting the pitfalls of the Bill in appropriate fora

title: Kerala’s election outcome could redefine IUML’s political path
content: In the event of a UDF defeat or a hung Assembly, the IUML is likely to keep its options open. While it has been a steadfast ally of the Congress in Kerala for decades, its historical willingness to engage with the Left reflects a pragmatic approach to power-sharing and political survival

title: Kerala panel seeks public suggestions on law to curb black magic, harmful practices
content: The committee is tasked with recommending legislative measures to curb harmful practices carried out in the name of superstition

title: 250 youth volunteers set to receive training in disaster management
content: As part of the Yuva Aapda Mitra project, training programme for the volunteers begins in Kozhikode city under the supervision of the District Disaster Management Authority

title: Probe launched into use of fake number plates in fuel theft cases
content: Most recent incidents, including one reported by a petrol pump owner at Edavannappara in Malappuram district last week, are backed by CCTV footage and point to a pattern in which suspects use duplicate registration numbers to conceal their identities

title: Bhumi puja performed for 56 power facilities worth ₹97 cr
content: As many as 56 power infrastructure facilities will be readied for the Godavari Pushkarams-2027 at a cost of ₹96.90 crore in Rajamahendravaram and Rajanagaram constituencies; the infrastructure development would include laying underground power cables and setting up a power station

title: Doval’s Riyadh visit on PM’s instructions, part of government outreach to Gulf: MEA
content: In a statement, the Saudi Ministry of Foreign Affairs said that the talks between the Saudi Foreign Minister and Mr. Doval had reviewed areas of India-Saudi cooperation, “alongside a discussion of the latest developments in the regional situation and an exchange of viewpoints regarding it”.

title: Kharge asks if Modi wants to be CM of West Bengal
content: Describing the defeat of the Constitution Amendment Bill in Parliament as ‘PM Modi’s defeat’, Congress president accuses the Prime Minister PM of ‘neglecting his official work’ and travelling across Bengal for too long

title: Watch: Can Iran and the U.S. find middle ground?
content: In the latest episode of Above the Fold, we look at the next phase of peace talks between the US and Iran appear to be uncertain ahead of Wednesday’s ceasefire deadline. In other news, fresh violence that has gripped Manipur; a powerful earthquake that jolted Japan; the deadliest mass shooting in Louisiana; updates from the fireworks factory explosion in Virudhunagar, and more.

title: Israel condemns soldier’s desecration of crucifix in south Lebanon
content: The image appears to show an Israeli soldier using a sledgehammer to strike the head on a statue of a crucified Jesus that had fallen off a cross

title: Poll bugle to fall silent across Tamil Nadu on Tuesday evening
content: All political functionaries and party workers who are not voters of a constituency must clear out immediately after 6 p.m. Tuesday

title: Allahabad HC judge recuses from Rahul Gandhi citizenship case, censures petitioner over social media posts
content: The court observed that the petitioner had publicly suggested ‘foul play’ and attempted to draw the judiciary into a political controversy; the judge remarked that such statements amounted to maligning the institution

title: Urea use stable despite 36% rise in cropped area in A.P.
content: Per-hectare availability drops 34% as e-Panta coverage doubles and enforcement tightens, curbing excess fertilizer use

title: Opening of ‘polling material room’ in Kozhikode kicks up a row
content: UDF candidates of six constituencies in Kozhikode say strong room was opened under the supervision of officials without prior intimation to candidates. Collector and returning officer for Perambra say an unsealed room housing polling materials was opened in the presence of candidates’ agents to collect data for updating poll software

title: SOP issued for verification of assets declared by candidates during elections, Income-Tax departments tells Madras High Court
content: Additional Solicitor General AR.L. Sundaresan makes the submission during the hearing of a case filed against Deputy Chief Minister Udhayanidhi Stalin

title: Digital arrest is a crime against human dignity: CJI
content: Such frauds result in not only financial loss but also a ‘blistering sense of violation’ in victims, Chief Justice of India Surya Kant says at a lecture; he says while the crimes are executed with speed and coordination, institutional response in India has been ‘fragmented and sequential’.

title: 21 killed, over 61 injured after bus tumbles down hillside in Jammu’s Udhampur
content: The bus crushed an autorickshaw before landing upside down on the road below. President, PM express grief

title: IISc’s Centre for Brain Research launches ₹2 crore AI challenge for early detection of cognitive decline
content: Submissions are open from April 20 to May 20 and will undergo a rigorous review by expert jury members

title: Ahead of Pahalgam anniversary, security tightened in Kashmir Valley
content: vigilance has been stepped up and precautionary mechanisms have been fortified, but efforts are underway to avoid unnecessary public alarm . in the aftermath, 44 tourist destinations across J&K were closed as a precaution . authorities have kept Baisaran closed to visitors .

title: 26 score perfect 100 in JEE Main; 2.5 lakh qualify for Advanced
content: Manash Pratim Gohain is a seasoned journalist with over two decades at The Times of India, where he has built a rich body of work spanning education policy, politics, and governance. Renowned for his incisive coverage of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, accreditation reforms, and skilling initiatives, he has also reported on student politics, urban policy, and social movements. His political reportage—both reflective and news-driven—adds depth to his writing, bridging policy with public impact. Through his 2,500 articles and related outlets, he has emerged as a trusted voice in national discourse, particularly in linking education reform to broader societal change. Read More

title: Bus plunges into Udhampur gorge, 21 dead
content: bus skidded off the road and fell into a gorge in the hilly Khagote area . at least 21 people died and 51 injured in the crash . the bus landed upside down on a road below, crushing an auto-rickshaw .

title: Pahalgam’s primary defence against tragedy still runs from five rooms
content: staff processed 26 bodies and 17 wounded survivors . the one-storey facility was the thin line between life and death following the terrorist attack in Baisaran valley near Pahalgam . one year later, the line remains dangerously thin .

title: US-Iran talks on hold as Hormuz hardball threatens second round
content: a second round of talks between the united states and Iran hangs in suspense amid a fog of mistrust and misinformation . the message, relayed through Pakistan and Iranian official media, has stopped US vice president JD Vance’s second trip to Islamabad dead in its tracks .

title: US seizes Iranian ship but both sides say Pakistan talks on
content: both sides indicated they were planning to send negotiators to peace talks in Pakistan this week . despite mixed signals, especially over the seizure of a cargo ship by the us . the ship was boarded by US troops on Sunday off the coast of Chabahar port .

title: Downed fences, beat-up mannequins headline scene for Sabres' Game 1 win
content: the Sabres seal their first playoff win since 2011 with a four-goal third period . fans jumped in the air, waving their white "We're Back" towels and embracing those alongside them . it was a climatic return to the playoffs after an NHL record 14-season drought .

title: West playoff takeaways: Thunder, Spurs roll in Sunday's games
content: Denver Nuggets and Minnesota Timberwolves kicked things off for the Western Conference on Saturday . jamal Murray led all players with 30 points to take a 1-0 lead . the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Houston Rockets 107-98 in the day's final game .

title: East playoff takeaways: Magic shock Pistons, Celtics dominate Sixers
content: Donovan Mitchell led all players with 32 points, and James Harden made his Cleveland playoff debut with 22 . Max Strus erupted for 24 points off the bench in the win . the Knicks beat the Hawks 113-102, as new york held Atlanta to 45 first-half points .

title: The fallout of a stunning Lawrence trade: Four takeaways
content: Jeremy Fowler discusses the many options the Giants have in the first round . he traded Dexter Lawrence II for the 10th pick of the NFL draft . the game has changed as organizations around the league pay a premium for veteran defensive linemen .

title: The unprecedented rise of Fernando Mendoza
content: there's no throw he can make this week that could outdazzle the missile he launched to beat Penn State last fall . he's at the podium, fielding questions from a flock of reporters who are eager to he .

title: Reid's final NFL mock draft: We projected fits for all 32 teams across seven rounds
content: the 2026 draft gets rolling from Pittsburgh at 8 p.m. ET . this mock draft features 257 prospects who I believe will be selected this week . we'll start things off with the Las Vegas Raiders at No. 1 .

title: The blue blood and the new blood: What we learned at Notre Dame and Indiana this spring
content: the IU men's basketball team missed the ACC tournament for the third straight season . the team has advanced past the first round just once in a decade . there's a can't-miss, floor-to-ceiling advertisement for Indiana football .

title: Free agent pickups: Need some pitching? Look to Twins and Astros
content: if a pickup transforms into a helpful hand for tomorrow, that's all the better . if your league still allows you time to pivot . the Houston Astros rotation is in a precarious spot with all of its injuries . his curveball was outstanding in his 2026 debut on Wednesday .

title: New draft rules soon on 'E85 & more' vehicles as government pushes ethanol shift
content: road transport ministry had notified the 'applicability of test requirements' for vehicles that can run on almost 100 per cent ethanol (E100) and petrol . draft notification to replace condition of E85 to "E85 or more" was issued on June 27, 2025 . but final notification could not be issued within the stipulated six months .
